resources.string: Account and password do not match

* According to the historical order records of this machine, the Pro version has been activated for you, but the order number has not been found. If you have previously paid to activate the Pro version through Huawei Pay, it is recommended that you download the DevInfo App from the Huawei App Store, bind the order record to the DevInfo App Account, and then download the DevInfo App from any channel You can synchronize the Pro version by logging in to your account. \nIf you have any questions, please contact us: support@liuzhosoft.com

* According to the historical order records of this machine, the Pro version has been activated for you, but the order number has not been found. If you have previously paid for the Pro version through Huawei Pay, it is recommended that you click the Restore Purchase button to query and bind the order record to the DevInfo App Account. You can then download the DevInfo App from any channel. Synchronize the Pro version by logging in to your account. \nIf you have any questions, please contact us: support@liuzhosoft.com
Purchase %s to permanently remove in-app ads and unlock additional premium features.

Please allow us to obtain 【Installed App List】data.
View app details, app management, app analysis and other functions need your permission and authorization before they can be used.
We will not attempt to obtain this data without your permission, and the corresponding functions will not be available.

You have allowed us to obtain [Installed App List] data, but have not granted this permission in the system. Please click Grant to enter the system settings page, find and grant the Query All Packages permission. \nIf you have granted this permission in the system, but still receive this prompt, please restart the %1$s app to activate this permission.

The default install location for the application. The following values are accepted:
1. Internal Only - The application must be installed on the internal device storage only. If this is set, the application will never be installed on the external storage. If the internal storage is full, then the system will not install the application. This is also the default behavior. 
2. Auto - The application may be installed on the external storage, but the system will install the application on the internal storage by default. If the internal storage is full, then the system will install it on the external storage. Once installed, the user can move the application to either internal or external storage through the system settings. 
3. Prefer External - The application prefers to be installed on the external storage (SD card). There is no guarantee that the system will honor this request. The application might be installed on internal storage if the external media is unavailable or full. Once installed, the user can move the application to either internal or external storage through the system settings.
The default install location for the application.

Application installer, with the ability to install Android APK to the phone. Generally, the built-in application market, GooglePlay, and some system applications can be installed/updated silently; if it is displayed as unknown, it may be an application installed through special means such as ADB.
Application installer, with the ability to install Android APK to the phone.

A number designating the minimum Android API Level required for the application to run. The Android system will prevent the user from installing the application if the system\'s API Level is lower than the value specified in this attribute. Google Play uses the this attributes to filter app from devices that do not meet it\'s platform version requirements.
Minimum Android API Level required for the application to run.

Whether the native library of the application is adapted for arm64-v8a CPU. Applications that are compatible with 64bit have better performance; if they are not adapted for 64bit, some 64bit CPUs are not backward compatible, and the application will not run correctly; Google has forced applications to be adapted from August 1, 2019 64bit CPU.
The native library of the application adapts to 32bit and 64bit
Rotate the pie chart with finger touch
The signature algorithm name for the certificate signature algorithm. An example is the string \"SHA256withRSA\"
The signature algorithm name for the certificate signature algorithm.

A number designating the Android API Level that the application targets. This attribute informs the system that application is tested against the target version and the system should not enable any compatibility behaviors to maintain app\'s forward-compatibility with the target version. The application is still able to run on older versions (down to Min Sdk Version).
Android API Level that the application targets.
A user-readable label for the activity. The label is displayed on-screen when the activity must be represented to the user. It\'s often displayed along with the activity icon.
Activity start mode, there are four configurations: Single top, Single instance, Single task and Standard.
The screen orientation of the activity. Some pages are forced to be horizontal or vertical by the developer. In most cases, they are automatically adapted according to the phone sensor.
The name of a permission that clients must have to launch the activity or otherwise get it to respond to an intent.
The processing behavior of the soft input when the activity is visible.
The name of the stack on which the activity resides. This is related to the start mode of the activity.
Android applications are distributed as an Android Application Packages (APK). Once installed, APK file is saved in storage. This attribute represents path to APK file of given application.
Location from which was APK file installed
The name of this application. This name is displayed to users. Internally, Android uses package name attribute as a unique identifier of application.
Full path to the default directory assigned to the package for its persistent data.
The permission description string, if any, provided in the AndroidManifest file. He will describe some details of the authority.
The group this permission is a part of.
Public name of this item. From the android:name attribute.

The protected level and label of the permission. 
 
1.Normal: The permissions are declared as Normal, and any application can be applied. When installing the application, the user will not be directly prompted. Click All to display it. 
 
2.Dangerous: The permissions are declared as Dangerous level, and any application can apply for it. When installing the application, it will directly prompt the user. 
 
3.Signature: The permission is declared as the Signature level. Only applications signed with the same private key as the apk (apk that defines this permission) can apply for this permission. The permissions declared in frameworks/base/core/res/AndroidManifest.xml are at the Signature level, so only applications signed by the Android official with the same private key can apply for this permission. 
 
4.SignatureOrSystem: The permission is declared as the SignatureOrSystem level, and two applications can apply for this permission. 
 1). An application signed with the same private key as the apk (apk that defines this permission). 
 2). Applications in the /system/app directory.
End of validity period of the certificate.
This feature is required by the application
The time at which the app was first installed.
Flutter is an open-source UI software development kit created by Google.
Gradle is a JVM-based build system. Android Gradle is a system that developers use to build Android installation packages.
This APK file has been exported to : \n%1$s
This file has been saved to : \n%1$s

The default install location for the application. The following values are accepted:
1. Internal Only - The application must be installed on the internal device storage only. If this is set, the application will never be installed on the external storage. If the internal storage is full, then the system will not install the application. This is also the default behavior. 
2. Auto - The application may be installed on the external storage, but the system will install the application on the internal storage by default. If the internal storage is full, then the system will install it on the external storage. Once installed, the user can move the application to either internal or external storage through the system settings. 
3. Prefer External - The application prefers to be installed on the external storage (SD card). There is no guarantee that the system will honor this request. The application might be installed on internal storage if the external media is unavailable or full. Once installed, the user can move the application to either internal or external storage through the system settings.
Country of issuer of the certificate
Name of issuer of the certificate
Name of organization of issuer of the certificate

Kotlin is a statically typed programming language that executes on the Java Virtual Machine.\nOn 7 May 2019, Google announced that the Kotlin programming language is now its preferred language for Android app developers.
The time at which the app was last updated.

A number designating the minimum Android API Level required for the application to run. The Android system will prevent the user from installing the application if the system\'s API Level is lower than the value specified in this attribute. Google Play uses the this attributes to filter app from devices that do not meet it\'s platform version requirements.
Value of Min SDK attribute resolved to the version of Android

Whether the native library of the application is adapted for arm64-v8a CPU. Applications that are compatible with 64bit have better performance; if they are not adapted for 64bit, some 64bit CPUs are not backward compatible, and the application will not run correctly; Google has forced applications to be adapted from August 1, 2019 64bit CPU.

The name of this package. From the Android Manifest tag\'s name attribute. The package name serves as a unique identifier for the application. It\'s also the default name for the application process and the default task affinity of an activity.
Allows a calling app to continue a call which was started in another app. An example is a video calling app that wants to continue a voice call on the user\'s mobile network.

Allows an app to access location in the background. If you\'re requesting this permission, you must also request either ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION or ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION. Requesting this permission by itself doesn\'t give you location access.
Allows an app to access approximate location. Alternatively, you might want ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION.
Allows an app to access precise location. Alternatively, you might want ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION.
Allows an application to access extra location provider commands.
Allows an application to access any geographic locations persisted in the user\'s shared collection.
Allows applications to access information about networks.
Marker permission for applications that wish to access notification policy. This permission is not supported on managed profiles.
Allows applications to access information about Wi-Fi networks.
Allows an application to recognize physical activity.
Allows the app to answer an incoming phone call.
Allows an application to collect battery statistics
Must be required by an AccessibilityService, to ensure that only the system can bind to it.
Must be required by a AutofillService, to ensure that only the system can bind to it.
Must be required by a CallRedirectionService, to ensure that only the system can bind to it.
A subclass of CarrierMessagingClientService must be protected with this permission.

The system process that is allowed to bind to services in carrier apps will have this permission. Carrier apps should use this permission to protect their services that only the system is allowed to bind to.
Must be required by a ConditionProviderService, to ensure that only the system can bind to it.
Must be required by device administration receiver, to ensure that only the system can interact with it.
Must be required by an DreamService, to ensure that only the system can bind to it.
Must be required by a InCallService, to ensure that only the system can bind to it.
Must be required by an InputMethodService, to ensure that only the system can bind to it.
Must be required by an MidiDeviceService, to ensure that only the system can bind to it.
Must be required by a HostApduService or OffHostApduService to ensure that only the system can bind to it.
Must be required by an NotificationListenerService, to ensure that only the system can bind to it.
Must be required by a PrintService, to ensure that only the system can bind to it.
Must be required by a QuickAccessWalletService to ensure that only the system can bind to it.
Must be required by a RemoteViewsService, to ensure that only the system can bind to it.
Must be required by a CallScreeningService, to ensure that only the system can bind to it.
Must be required by a ConnectionService, to ensure that only the system can bind to it.
Must be required by a TextService (e.g. SpellCheckerService) to ensure that only the system can bind to it.
Must be required by a TvInputService to ensure that only the system can bind to it.
Must be required by a link VisualVoicemailService to ensure that only the system can bind to it.
Must be required by a VoiceInteractionService, to ensure that only the system can bind to it.
Must be required by a VpnService, to ensure that only the system can bind to it.
Must be required by an VrListenerService, to ensure that only the system can bind to it.
Must be required by a WallpaperService, to ensure that only the system can bind to it.
Allows applications to connect to paired bluetooth devices.
Allows applications to discover and pair bluetooth devices.
Allows an application to access data from sensors that the user uses to measure what is happening inside their body, such as heart rate.

Allows an application to broadcast sticky intents. These are broadcasts whose data is held by the system after being finished, so that clients can quickly retrieve that data without having to wait for the next broadcast.

Allows an app which implements the InCallService API to be eligible to be enabled as a calling companion app. This means that the Telecom framework will bind to the app\'s InCallService implementation when there are calls active. The app can use the InCallService API to view information about calls on the system and control these calls.
Allows an application to initiate a phone call without going through the Dialer user interface for the user to confirm the call.
Required to be able to access the camera device.
Allows an application to modify the current configuration, such as locale.
Allows applications to change network connectivity state.
Allows applications to enter Wi-Fi Multicast mode.
Allows applications to change Wi-Fi connectivity state.
Allows an application to clear the caches of all installed applications on the device.
Old permission for deleting an app\'s cache files, no longer used, but signals for us to quietly ignore calls instead of throwing an exception.
Allows applications to disable the keyguard if it is not secure.
Allows an application to expand or collapse the status bar.
Allows a regular application to use Service.startForeground.
Allows access to the list of accounts in the Accounts Service.
Allows access to the list of accounts in the Accounts Service.
Allows an application to find out the space used by any package.

This permission can be used on content providers to allow the global search system to access their data. Typically it used when the provider has some permissions protecting it (which global search would not be expected to hold), and added as a read-only permission to the path in the provider where global search queries are performed. This permission can not be held by regular applications; it is used by applications to protect themselves from everyone else besides global search.
Allows an instant app to create foreground services.
Allows applications to open network sockets.
Allows a data loader to read a package\'s access logs. The access logs contain the set of pages referenced over time.
Allows an application a broad access to external storage in scoped storage. Intended to be used by few apps that need to manage files on behalf of the users.
Allows to query ongoing call details and manage ongoing calls

Allows a calling application which manages it own calls through the self-managed ConnectionService APIs. See PhoneAccount.CAPABILITY_SELF_MANAGED for more information on the self-managed ConnectionService APIs.
Allows an application to modify global audio settings.
Allows applications to perform I/O operations over NFC.
Allows applications to receive NFC preferred payment service information.
Allows applications to receive NFC transaction events.
Allows an application to collect component usage statistics
Allows query of any normal app on the device, regardless of manifest declarations.
Allows an application to read the user\'s calendar data.
Allows an application to read the user\'s call log.
Allows an application to read the user\'s contacts data.
Allows an application to read from external storage.
Allows read access to the device\'s phone number(s). This is a subset of the capabilities granted by READ_PHONE_STATE but is exposed to instant applications.
Allows read only access to phone state, including the current cellular network information, the status of any ongoing calls, and a list of any PhoneAccounts registered on the device.
Allows an application to read SMS messages.
Allows applications to read the sync settings.
Allows applications to read the sync stats.

Allows an application to receive the Intent.ACTION_BOOT_COMPLETED that is broadcast after the system finishes booting. If you don\'t request this permission, you will not receive the broadcast at that time. Though holding this permission does not have any security implications, it can have a negative impact on the user experience by increasing the amount of time it takes the system to start and allowing applications to have themselves running without the user being aware of them. As such, you must explicitly declare your use of this facility to make that visible to the user.
Allows an application to monitor incoming MMS messages.
Allows an application to receive SMS messages.
Allows an application to receive WAP push messages.
Allows an application to record audio.
Allows an application to change the Z-order of tasks.
Allows app to request to be associated with a device via CompanionDeviceManager as a watch
Allows a companion app to run in the background.
Allows a companion app to use data in the background.

Allows an application to request deleting packages. Apps targeting APIs Build.VERSION_CODES.P or greater must hold this permission in order to use Intent.ACTION_UNINSTALL_PACKAGE or PackageInstaller.uninstall(VersionedPackage, IntentSender).
Permission an application must hold in order to use Settings.ACTION_REQUEST_IGNORE_BATTERY_OPTIMIZATIONS.
Allows an application to request installing packages. Apps targeting APIs greater than 25 must hold this permission in order to use Intent.ACTION_INSTALL_PACKAGE.
Allows an application to request the screen lock complexity and prompt users to update the screen lock to a certain complexity level.
Allows an application to send SMS messages.
Allows applications to set the wallpaper.
Allows applications to set the wallpaper hints.
Allows the holder to start the permission usage screen for an app.

Allows an app to create windows using the type WindowManager.LayoutParams.TYPE_APPLICATION_OVERLAY, shown on top of all other apps. Very few apps should use this permission; these windows are intended for system-level interaction with the user.
Allows using the device\'s IR transmitter, if available.
Allows an app to use device supported biometric modalities.
Required for apps targeting Build.VERSION_CODES.Q that want to use notification full screen intents.
Allows to read device identifiers and use ICC based authentication like EAP-AKA. Often required in authentication to access the carrier\'s server and manage services of the subscriber.
Allows an application to use SIP service.
Allows using PowerManager WakeLocks to keep processor from sleeping or screen from dimming.
Allows an application to write the user\'s calendar data.
Allows an application to write (but not read) the user\'s call log data.
Allows an application to write the user\'s contacts data.
Allows an application to write to external storage.
Allows an application to read or write the system settings.
Allows applications to write the sync settings.
The name of the process this application should run in. From the process attribute or, if not set, the same as package name.
Authorities that identify data offered by the content provider. Data offered by this content provider are published under this identification.

Whether the content provider is available for other applications to use:

true: The provider is available to other applications. Any application can use the provider's content URI to access it, subject to the permissions specified for the provider. 

false: The provider is not available to other applications. Set android:exported=false to limit access to the provider to your applications. Only applications that have the same user ID (UID) as the provider will have access to it.
Optional permission required for read-only access this content provider.
Optional permission required for read/write access this content provider.
MD5 hash of public key of the certificate.
React Native is an open-source UI software framework created by Meta Platforms, Inc.

Whether or not the broadcast receiver can receive messages from sources outside its application - \"yes\" if it can, and \"no\" if not. If no, the only messages the broadcast receiver can receive are those sent by components of the same application or applications with the same user ID.

The name of a permission that broadcasters must have to send a message to the broadcast receiver. If this attribute is not set, the permission set by the application element\'s permission attribute applies to the broadcast receiver. If neither attribute is set, the receiver is not protected by a permission.

Whether the permission has been granted for the application. Some sensitive permissions need to be actively authorized by the user, such as read and write SD card permissions, and some basic permissions are granted by default by the system, such as network connection permissions.
This app did not apply for any sensitive permissions

Serial Number value from the certificate. The serial number is an integer assigned by the certification authority to each certificate. It must be unique for each certificate issued by a given CA (i.e., the issuer name and serial number identify a unique certificate).
If true, service may be called by another activity.
The service can be bound and run in the calling application\'s package, rather than the package in which it is declared.
The service will run in its own isolated process.
Optional name of a permission required to be able to access this Service.
Single instance of the service will run for all users on the device.
The service will automatically be stopped by the system if the user removes a task that is rooted in one of the application\'s activities.
The signature algorithm name for the certificate signature algorithm. An example is the string \"SHA256withRSA\"
Start of validity period of the certificate.
Country of subject of the certificate
Name of subject of the certificate
Name of organization of subject of the certificate
If set to true, this application is installed in the device\'s system image.

A number designating the Android API Level that the application targets. This attribute informs the system that application is tested against the target version and the system should not enable any compatibility behaviors to maintain app\'s forward-compatibility with the target version. The application is still able to run on older versions (down to Min Sdk Version).
Value of Target SDK attribute resolved to the version of Android
The kernel user-ID that has been assigned to this application. Currently this is not a unique ID as multiple applications can have the same uid.
Unity is a cross-platform game engine developed by Unity Technologies.
Unreal Engine (UE) is a 3D computer graphics game engine developed by Epic Games, first showcased in the 1998 first-person shooter game Unreal.

An internal version number. This number is used only to determine whether one version is more recent than another, with higher numbers indicating more recent versions. This is not the version number shown to users; that number is set by the Version name attribute.
The version number shown to users. The attribute has no other purpose than to be displayed to users. The Version code attribute holds the significant version number used internally.
Please press \"Continue\" if you choose to start using our app.
Enable the Creative Debugger SDK settings in order to view recent ads.
Displays more info about the list item.
To use %s you must agree to our Terms & Conditions and affirm you have reviewed our Privacy Policy
To use %s you must affirm that you have reviewed and acknowledged our Privacy Policy.
Are you sure you want to exit?
The current account email address has been bound to %1$s, please use this email address for subsequent account operations.

You have successfully bound the order, and you can automatically synchronize the Pro version benefits by logging in to your current account on any device. Your Huawei order records will also be retained and are permanently valid.
Failed, This account already has a bound Huawei ID
Failed, This account already has a bound Wechat
To test Bluetooth, you need to grant \"Nearby devices\" permission first.
Analysis all installed apps and system apps.
Analysis storage usage, Cleanup junk files.
Adding failed, please check whether the [Add Shortcut] permission is enabled

If the MegaPixel count shown is wrong, that means your device manufacturer has limited the access to the camera for third-party apps. Also even if your device has more than one camera on one side, Android OS identifies them as a single camera for that side.
Only the account bound to the email is supported to change the password.
Clean up immediately to free up space!
Tap to analyze %1$s sensitive permissions and more details info.
Tap the screen to continue testing
Click the Add button to start configuring your custom monitor
The theme color has been applied.
%1$s won\'t work unless you enable Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device.
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device.
%1$s won\'t run unless you update Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are currently updating.
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
Are you sure to delete %1$s… etc., a total of %2$d files?
Are you sure you want to unbind Huawei ID from the current account?
Are you sure you want to unbind WeChat from the current account?
The current environment does not support Huawei pay.
Sorry, the current environment does not support payment.
Customized floating monitors are a feature exclusive to the Pro version. Currently, you can add and edit monitors, but you need to activate the Pro version to enable them.
You can directly drag the floating window to move it. This controller is used for subtle movements.
I have carefully read and confirmed to delete the account
Delete account is an extremely dangerous act, please confirm whether to continue?
Once the account is deleted, it cannot be restored, and the bound third-party login will also become invalid.
If you use a deleted account to re-register, the previous account data will not be restored, including Pro version rights.
If you have purchased and activated the Pro version, after deleting your account, the benefits of the Pro version will also be canceled and cannot be restored.
The device information content file has been exported to : \n%1$s
Were the screen one solid color?
* Some dual-cell devices only report half of the actual current. Check this option to display correctly.
You only need to configure this if you are certain that your device has dual cells and the battery data is abnormal.
Touch and draw to make measurements
Cover the area above the display. Is the illustration changing?
Make sure the phone sound is not turned off. \n\nAudio is playing. Can you hear it?
This email account does not exist
Email verification has expired, please re-verify
No redundant files, no need to clean up.
Failed to send verification code, please try again later.
The current verification code has not expired.
The current analyze task has not been completed. Do you want to end the task and exit?
Are you sure you want to give up the registered account?
Need to write storage permission to export device information file
Export device details as a file
No redundant files, no need to clean up.
New files created within 7 days, may affect some app, please delete carefully
Delete the same file in different paths to save space
Browse screenshots in your phone, delete unnecessary pictures to reduce space usage
Sorry for not being able to choose smart
%1$d files have been intelligently selected for you
* Only include files that actually exist in internal storage
Display all files in order according to file size
Files larger than 10MB stored in the device may contain important files, please clean them carefully
Temporary files, log files and empty files (folders) that do not affect the normal use of the device can be cleaned with confidence
Turning on this feature requires you to grant the Post Notifications permission.
This device does not have a fingerprint sensor
Too many attempts. Please try again later.
The flashlight needs to be implemented by the camera on the lower version of the device. Please grant [%1$s] camera permission in the system settings page
The monitor is running, click to setting
Global & real-time monitoring of equipment data
No PIN, pattern, or password set.
This device does not support PIN, pattern, or password.
Please switch to Recent Tasks list(long press home button), Then lock %1$s background task
Please check the system settings or the device does not support GNSS/GPS.
* Divide the battery voltage by 2 for display; this will only take effect when the reported voltage exceeds 7V.
I have read and agree to the above
If you can help us with the translation, please send an email to support@liuzhosoft.com to get in touch with us. We greatly appreciate your support and assistance!
If the device name displayed in the app is wrong

1. Long press or pinch with two fingers on the home screen
 
2. Find and click the 'Widgets' menu
 
3. Find our widgets and drag it to the home screen
This order record has been bound
Huawei authorization failed, please try again later
This Huawei ID has been registered
I have read and agreed to the %1$s and %2$s
The failure to initialize the flash function may be related to the camera being occupied and the camera not being released by other applications.
The default install location for the application.

Application installer, with the ability to install Android APK to the phone. Generally, the built-in application market, GooglePlay, and some system applications can be installed/updated silently; if it is displayed as unknown, it may be an application installed through special means such as ADB.
Application installer, with the ability to install Android APK to the phone.
You have already activated the Pro version and do not need to use the redemption code.
You have already activated the Pro version and do not need to use the redemption code. Please keep this redemption code for future use.
Cover the area above the display. Is the value changing?
Like DevInfo? Write your evaluation in the app market. 5 stars �� is the highest score ~
Please log in to Huawei account first
Account and password do not match
Long press and drag to sort
Make sure the phone sound is not turned off. \n\nAudio is playing. Can you hear it?
Login has expired, please log in again
Date does not match expected pattern: %1$s
Date out of expected year range %1$s - %2$s
Swipe to select a year, or tap to switch back to selecting a day
Scroll to show the next month
Scroll to show the previous month
Switch to text input mode for the time input
Switch to clock mode for the time input
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
Minimum Android API Level required for the application to run.
Off: The floating window can be dragged. \n\nOn: The floating window cannot be dragged, and touch events can pass through the floating window.
The monitor displays real-time data through the floating window, so you need to grant the permission of the floating window.
Off: When the app is reopened, all monitor switches will be set to off. \n\nOn: Record the monitor switch status, and automatically display the opened monitor window when the app is reopened.
The above settings are invalid for custom monitors, which need to be set separately.
Start date selection: %1$s – End date selection: %2$s

Whether the native library of the application is adapted for arm64-v8a CPU. Applications that are compatible with 64bit have better performance; if they are not adapted for 64bit, some 64bit CPUs are not backward compatible, and the application will not run correctly; Google has forced applications to be adapted from August 1, 2019 64bit CPU.
The native library of the application adapts to 32bit and 64bit
You need to agree to our privacy policy to use this service
Allow app to send you notifications?
Thanks for your interest.\nWe will share more once you\'re back online.
You are back online! Let\'s pick up where we left off
You are back online! Continue learning about %s
We\'ll send you a notification with a link to the advertiser site.
Open ad when you\'re back online.

If you continue to purchase, it means that you have read and agreed to the following information: 
 
1. After purchase, you can get: no ads, enjoy all advanced features (including subsequent updates of advanced features) and other privileges. 
 
2. The PRO version is bound to the currently logged in Huawei account. If you need to replace the device, make sure you can log in to the current Huawei account. 
 
3. Permanently effective after purchase. 
 
4. No refund after purchase. 
 
5. Contact the developer: support@liuzhosoft.com

If you continue to purchase, it means that you have read and agreed to the following information: 
 
1. After purchase, you can get: no ads, enjoy all advanced features (including subsequent updates of advanced features) and other privileges. 
 
2. The PRO version is bound to the currently logged in Google account. If you need to replace the device, make sure you can log in to the current Google account. 
 
3. Permanently effective after purchase. 
 
4. No refund after purchase. 
 
5. Contact the developer: support@liuzhosoft.com
Place an enrolled finger on the fingerprint sensor to pass the test. Please enroll a finger if you haven\'t.
Place your finger on the sensor
Are you sure you want to log out of the current account?
Please enter the correct email address.
Please enter a new email address
Please enter the verification code of the new email address
Please enter the original email verification code
Please switch to other payment methods
Please read and agree to %1$s and %2$s
Use practical and beautiful desktop widgets
Your account has been activated with the permanent Pro version, and there is no need to bind an order.

1. After purchase, you can get: no ads, enjoy all advanced features (including subsequent updates) and other privileges. 

2. Permanently valid after purchase. 

3. No refunds after purchase. 

4. Contact the developer: support@liuzhosoft.com

You can also ignore this operation, and the benefits of the Pro version will continue to be with your logged-in Huawei account and will be permanently valid. \nIf you have any questions, please contact us: support@liuzhosoft.com

You can also ignore this operation, and the Pro version benefits will still follow your logged-in Huawei account and be permanently valid. \nIf you have any questions, please contact us: support@liuzhosoft.com

To view some data (such as WiFi name, SIM area code, etc.), you need to grant [location permission]. Please grant permission before viewing.
To view some data (such as phone numbers, etc.), you need to grant the [Read phone number] permission. Please grant the permission before viewing.
To view some data (such as SIM-related data, device-related data, etc.), you need to grant the [Read phone state] permission. Please grant the permission before viewing.
Please grant us the Post Notification permission for a more complete functional experience. The following features require this permission.

Allow Ad to create a calendar event?
Beidou Navigation Satellite System is a global satellite navigation system independently developed by China.
GALILEO (Galileo satellite navigation system) is a global satellite navigation and positioning system developed and established by the European Union.
GLONASS (Global Navigation Satellite System) is a satellite navigation system developed by the Soviet Union/Russia.
IRNSS (Indian Regional Navigation Satellite System) is a free regional satellite navigation system developed by the Indian Space Research Organization (ISRO).
GPS (Global Positioning System) is a high-precision radio navigation positioning system developed and launched by the United States based on artificial earth satellites.

QZSS (Quasi-Zenith Satellite System), the Quasi-Zenith Satellite System, is a satellite amplification system that uses three artificial satellites to complete the regional functions of the Global Positioning System through time transfer. It is a satellite system developed in Japan.

SBAS (Satellite-Based Augmentation System), a satellite-based augmentation system (wide-area differential augmentation system), uses geostationary orbit (GEO) satellites equipped with satellite navigation augmentation signal transponders to broadcast ephemeris errors, satellite clock errors, Ionospheric delay and other correction information can improve the positioning accuracy of the original satellite navigation system.
Black and white colors, some screens are warmer and some are colder
Detect the color performance of the screen, dead pixels, highlights
The more grayscale you can see, the better the screen effect
